mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate reduces the discount rate applied to future corporate earnings, directly compressing equity risk premiums and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the subsequent month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rapid increase in the unemployment rate signals deteriorating labor market conditions that precede corporate revenue contraction, causing immediate negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next week.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20-day returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite the unemployment spike, or the signal shows no predictive power in walk-forward testing.

mechanism_narrative: Divergence between residential construction starts and consumer credit outstanding indicates a breakdown in household balance sheet expansion, which mechanically reduces aggregate demand and drives negative S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: The interaction term shows no statistical significance in a multivariate regression, or forward returns do not differ significantly between divergence and convergence regimes.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating industrial production growth during a late-cycle expansion phase reflects sustained capacity utilization that boosts corporate margins, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the subsequent quarter.
failure_condition: Forward returns turn negative when INDPRO growth exceeds the 75th percentile of historical expansion phases, or the signal fails to outperform a buy-and-hold benchmark over rolling 60-day windows.

mechanism_narrative: Consumer price index readings exceeding a 3 percent annualized threshold trigger inflation hedging flows out of equities into commodities, mechanically depressing S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Equity returns remain positive or neutral when inflation crosses the 3 percent threshold, or the signal exhibits no directional consistency across multiple inflationary episodes.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous payroll growth deceleration and rising unemployment rate confirm a structural labor market inflection, which precedes earnings downgrades and generates negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next week.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to predict downward price moves in > 55% of out-of-sample instances, or univariate payroll trends alone explain the same variance as the interaction term.

mechanism_narrative: Positive real GDP growth confirms expanding aggregate economic activity, which directly supports corporate revenue projections and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the subsequent quarter.
failure_condition: Forward returns are negative or flat during consecutive quarters of positive GDP growth, or the signal shows no incremental predictive power beyond a simple momentum baseline.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained industrial production growth signals broad-based economic acceleration that lifts cyclical equity valuations, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Forward returns turn negative when INDPRO growth decelerates below the 50th percentile, or the signal fails to outperform a sector-neutral benchmark over rolling 20-day windows.
